criticalRules: MUST remain a continuous BasicBlock with blockType='c', simulationFunctionName='csslti4', simulationFunctionType='C_OR_FORTRAN', dependsOnU='0', and dependsOnT='1'.
exprs MUST be a ScilabString with height=2 and width=1: line 0 is the numerator polynomial, line 1 is the denominator polynomial.
Transfer function must be proper: degree(numerator) <= degree(denominator). Scilab rejects improper transfer functions for CLR.
realParameters do NOT store the raw polynomial coefficients. They store the flattened state-space data [A(:); B(:); C(:); D] generated from the transfer function.
state vector length must match the system order implied by the state-space conversion. The default first-order example uses one state and 4 realParameters.
Geometry in the reference XML is 60x60 and both explicit ports include rotation=0 in their style; preserve the reference port structure when cloning.
description: Continuous Linear System Representation - Transfer function block with polynomial coefficients
anomalies: rotation attribute included in port style
dependsOnT=1 (time-dependent) but dependsOnU=0 (not input-dependent) - uses internal state
name: CLR
commonUses: Implementing linear filters and transfer functions
Modeling first and second order systems
Signal conditioning with known frequency response
